text: Any vehicle combination designed and used specifically for the transport of assembled (capable of being driven) motor vehicles.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 101-A — Automobile transporter

Any vehicle combination designed and used specifically for the transport of assembled (capable of being driven) motor vehicles.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: Any vehicle combination designed and used specifically for the transport of assembled (capable of being driven) motor vehicles.
